title: APM: Suspicious JavaScript Execution Patterns
description: Detects suspicious JavaScript execution patterns in browser telemetry indicating crypto mining, keylogging, formjacking, or other malicious client-side scripts. Uses OpenTelemetry browser instrumentation to monitor JS execution context.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and ((('Request URL' like '*coinhive*' or 'Request URL' like '*cryptonight*' or 'Request URL' like '*coin-hive*' or 'Request URL' like '*minero.cc*' or 'Request URL' like '*jsecoin*' or 'Request URL' like '*cryptoloot*')) or ( (('Span Attributes' like '*keydown*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*keypress*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*keyup*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*addEventListener*')) and (('Span Attributes' like '*creditcard*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*credit-card*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*payment*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*checkout*')) ) or (('Request URL' like '*btoa(*' or 'Request URL' like '*atob(*' or 'Request URL' like '*XMLHttpRequest*' or 'Request URL' like '*sendBeacon*'))) | stats count as Detections by 'Request URL', 'Client IP', 'User Agent', 'Service Name' | sort -Detections
